title: Address Activity Scanner
body: Discover every chain a wallet address is active on with a single API call.

title: Bridge Transaction Monitor
body: Track cross-chain bridge activity, finality, and token transfers in real time.

title: Chain Comparison Tool
body: Compare chain metrics — TPS, TVL, active addresses — side by side across networks.

title: Cross-chain Address Lookup
body: Resolve and look up the same address across all supported EVM chains at once.

title: Multichain Portfolio
body: Unified portfolio view aggregating assets across every GoldRush-supported chain.
